title: NFHS India Explorer: A harmonised NFHS-3 to NFHS-6 fact-sheet database and dashboard
description: An open, frontend-only (no-server) dashboard and harmonised long-format database of India's National Family Health Survey (NFHS) fact-sheet indicators across rounds 3 (2005-06), 4 (2015-16), 5 (2019-21) and 6 (2023-24), for India and all states/UTs at Urban/Rural/Total levels. Includes an interactive India choropleth, cross-round trends, state comparisons, a filterable data explorer with CSV/Excel/SQL download, comparability flags and per-round indicator definitions. Underlying estimates are from the IIPS NFHS fact sheets; this work is a derived compilation and is not produced or endorsed by IIPS or the Government of India.

creators.name: Pakhare, Abhijit
creators.affiliation: Department of Community & Family Medicine, All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Bhopal, India

creators.name: Joshi, Ankur
creators.affiliation: Department of Community & Family Medicine, All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS), Bhopal, India

notes: Underlying survey estimates are from the International Institute for Population Sciences (IIPS) NFHS fact sheets (NFHS-3 to NFHS-6), Ministry of Health & Family Welfare, Government of India. The compiled dataset is released under CC-BY-4.0; dashboard code under MIT.
